sn.e: We want to plan something together.

sn.s: "Was mached mir nöchsti Wuche?" fragt d'Sara.
sn.e: "What shall we do next week?" Sara asks.

sn.s: "Mir chönted go wandere," schlat de Lukas vor.

sn.e: "Or maybe to the cinema?" I say.

sn.s: "Gueti Idee. Wänn treffed mir öis?" frag ich.
sn.e: "Good idea. When do we meet?" I ask.

sn.s: "Ich freu mich scho druf," seit de Lukas.
sn.e: "I'm already looking forward to it," Lukas says.

sn.s: Plän mache für d'Zuekunft isch öppis Schöns.
sn.e: Making plans for the future is something nice.

sn.s: Es zeigt, dass mer zäme ghört.
"Ich lueg, öb's Wätter guet wird," säg ich.
sn.e: "I'll check if the weather will be good," I say.

sn.s: Mit Fründe Plän z'mache git Vorfreud.
sn.e: Making plans with friends brings anticipation.

sn.s: S'Läbe z'Luzärn wird voller und schöner.
sn.e: Life in Lucerne is getting fuller and nicer.
